summary: Build opens W13 — goal tier locked Monday: the twice-displaced W12 §10 TT ran 7-13 in 85°F at 23:23 → Tier C, sub-21:30 (Adj #164); T pace HELD at 7:50-7:55, RPE ≤7 anchor (Adj #166); MHR relocked 193 (Adj #165). Tuesday delivered: incline 150 landed at RIR 3 + first Build AMRAP 135×12 → 155 next Tue (Adj #168); preacher 70 landed (Adj #170); elbow clean 4th straight, SI + tendons clean AM/during/post. Wednesday's T sits 48 h post-race — honest §11.C morning check; yellow → easy, week's T forfeited. Friday = first VO2max session of the cycle (5×3 min @ 7:10-7:25). Saturday: row 80 bump; calf 355 AM-gated. Open item: two spare calendar weeks between contiguous W25 (ends 10-11) and race day 10-24 — placement decision by the W14 test (Adj #167).

days.note: Logged — 23:23 @ 7:32/mi avg, road, 85°F, fed, Vomero Plus; HR 189 avg / 193 peak (MHR relock 193, Adj #165); cadence 173; full WU incl. 4x20 s strides; no pain anywhere. TIER C LOCKED — sub-21:30 (Adj #164). T holds 7:50-7:55 (Adj #166).

days.session: Hyp A — incline 150 debut + Build scheme
days.note: Logged — incline 150×5 RIR 3 BUMP LANDED + AMRAP 135×12 (e1RM ~189, TM 168 stands) → 155 next Tue (Adj #168); preacher 70 LANDED 10/10/10/8 (Adj #170); DB lat 30 hold, tightest mid-block (Adj #169); pushdown 25 hold, set 3 best-yet 11 (Adj #171); crunch +10 10/10/6 rebuild continues (Adj #172); rear-delt opener drifted RIR 4 — hold (Adj #173). Fed; SI + all tendons clean AM/during/post; elbow clean 4th straight.
T 7:50-7:55, RPE ≤7 anchor (Adj #166). 48 h post-maximal-5K — run the §11.C morning check honestly; yellow → easy 30-40 min, week's T forfeited (Adj #167).

days.note: I pace 7:10-7:25 (Adj #166) — start at the slow end, RPE 9 anchor. First I-pace work; treadmill 1% or road.
